meta_title: For Students: project management to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Stop Abandoning Projects: Project Management for AI Builders
content.seo_description: Break the cycle of unfinished apps. Learn how to use project management, Antigravity, and Claude Code to ship your portfolio-ready AI projects faster.
content.answer_block: To finish your AI projects, adopt a 'Minimum Viable Scope' framework. By breaking your roadmap into 4-hour micro-sprints and leveraging AI-powered development tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you transform overwhelming feature lists into executable code, ensuring consistent momentum and successfully shipping your application to production.
content.intro:
The graveyard of abandoned GitHub repositories is littered with 'perfect' ideas that never saw the light of day. You start with a burst of inspiration, architecting a complex system, only to drown in scope creep and technical debt by the second week. It is the silent killer of every aspiring developer's career trajectory.

But the gap between a student and a senior engineer isn't raw talent—it's execution. By treating your code like a product manager treats a roadmap, you reclaim control. We are going to dismantle the paralysis of 'too much to do' and replace it with a high-velocity workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code.

steps.title: Decompose the Monolith
steps.description: Break your project into atomic, 4-hour tasks to prevent scope creep.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project requirements and decompose them into a hierarchical task list where each task takes no longer than 4 hours to complete.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Break down the project into a roadmap of 4-hour tasks'

steps.title: Define the MVP Scope
steps.description: Strictly prioritize features that provide core value to avoid feature bloat.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review my current task list and identify the top 3 features required for a functional MVP. Remove everything else from the immediate sprint.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Identify MVP features and create a tracking file'

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Use AI to scaffold your project so you can focus on unique business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modular project structure using the latest best practices for a full-stack AI application.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Scaffold the project structure based on modern best practices'

steps.title: Continuous Integration Cycles
steps.description: Implement a loop of coding and testing to ensure nothing breaks as you build.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a test suite for the core modules we just defined. Ensure it runs automatically on every commit.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Set up automated unit tests for core modules'

steps.title: Deploy the Milestone
steps.description: Push your current progress to a live environment to build psychological momentum.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a deployment script for Vercel/Render that automates the build and deployment process for this repository.

pro_tips: Never start coding without a clear 'Definition of Done' for the current session.
Use Claude Code to document your code as you write; technical debt is just undocumented progress.
If a task takes longer than 4 hours, it is too big. Split it again until it feels trivial.
Build in public by pushing your commits to a public repo; social accountability is the ultimate project manager.
Focus on the 'Happy Path' first; edge cases are for version 2.0.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, gather feedback from three peers, iterate on the most common pain point, and document your learning journey in a blog post.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the strategy to stop dreaming and start shipping. Every line of code you write today is a brick in the foundation of your future career. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
